title: 5 things a godly man builds in his 20s
caption:
Your 20s don't wait.

Most men spend them being entertained. Waiting for something to click. Hoping they'll figure it out eventually.

A godly man doesn't find himself in his 20s. He builds himself — specifically, on purpose, with God as the foundation.

5 things worth building now, before the window closes:

1. A body under his command. Not for vanity. For the discipline it forges.

2. A work ethic no one has to manage. Show up early. Do the hard job. Don't count the hours.

3. A conscience with no dark corners. "Confess your sins to one another, that you may be healed." — James 5:16. Kill what's killing you quietly.

4. One or two actual brothers. Not followers. Men who know your sin and show up. They're rare — pursue them.

5. A real rhythm with God. Not the performance. The daily habit — morning, before the phone, in the Word. That's the anchor everything else hangs from.

Build the man. The 20s are for it.

—

Comment "build" and I'll send you the link to ETHOS.

theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
